reviews.comment:
Pase solamente a calibrar neumáticos y al reclamarle al encargado de turno (22/2/18 10:25 hs) que el equipo estaba completamente descalibrado me respondió que era porque inflaman bicis y motos y eso lo descalibraba y que se arregla sólo. Tenia 38 en mis neumáticos, puse 32 y me los infló!!! Por suerte hay 3 calibradores y pude usar otro que aparentemente está calibrado! Lo que me molestó es la falta de compromiso del encargado que ni se preocupó por responderme que lo apagaria y prenderia para que se arregle! O que verían de buscar una solución... me sentí defraudado por el ACA

(Translated by Google)
I only went to calibrate tires and when I complained to the person in charge (2/22/18 10:25 AM) that the equipment was completely out of calibration, he responded that it was because they inflate bikes and motorcycles and that it was out of calibration and that it would fix itself. I had 38 on my tires, I put 32 and he inflated them!!! Luckily there are 3 calibrators and I was able to use another one that is apparently calibrated! What bothered me was the lack of commitment from the person in charge who didn't even bother to answer me that he would turn it off and on to fix it! Or that they would see to find a solution... I felt let down by the ACA
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnX0pyNzR3RRAB
